archetype: Neo-Brutalist Energy (Hybrid of Archetype 6: Vibrant Play & Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy)
design_philosophy: Modern indie game aesthetic. Ditching corporate SaaS looks for tactile, 'crafted' Neo-Brutalism. The UI should feel like a premium Nintendo Switch indie game: sharp, playful, clear, and energetic. Perfect for high schoolers—not too childish, but deeply engaging.

background.description: Warm off-white, paper-like feel to avoid harsh digital white.

text.description: Deep slate/charcoal for all borders and text. Never use pure black or light gray for text.

typography.instructions: Import 'Outfit' and 'Work Sans' from Google Fonts. Headings must always be highly readable. Avoid delicate thin weights; rely on bold/black weights for game UI.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for inner card padding. For main menus, gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for HUD pills.
spacing_and_layout.grids: Use Bento grid (Tetris mode) for the Phase Selection screen. Asymmetrical sizes for different levels.
spacing_and_layout.canvas_area: The game canvas should be 16:9 aspect ratio, centered, max-w-6xl mx-auto, with a thick border.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-slate-900 border-4 border-slate-900 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] rounded-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_10px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border-4 border-slate-900 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] rounded-xl font-bold uppercase hover:bg-slate-100 transition-all
buttons.play_huge: text-3xl py-6 px-12 bg-amber-400 text-slate-900 rounded-2xl border-4 border-slate-900 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0F172A]

energy_bar.container: h-8 w-64 bg-white border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-full overflow-hidden
energy_bar.fill: h-full bg-emerald-500 border-r-4 border-slate-900 transition-all duration-300 ease-out

tutorial_card.container: bg-amber-50 border-4 border-slate-900 shadow-[12px_12px_0px_#0F172A] rounded-2xl p-8 max-w-md w-full relative
tutorial_card.close_btn: absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-red-500 w-10 h-10 rounded-full border-4 border-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-white shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A]

motion.bouncy_ui: Use Framer Motion with spring physics: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 300, damping: 20 }. Elements should pop in.
motion.hover_states: Interactive elements should feel tactile, pushing down into their shadows on click.
motion.energy_collect: When energy is collected, the HUD bar should pulse slightly (scale up to 1.05 and back).

icons.usage: Use bold, thick-stroked icons (strokeWidth={3}). Map Sun for Solar, Droplets for Hydro, Wind for Wind power, Zap for Energy.

images.description: Aerial view of an eco-friendly city with solar panels and green spaces. Use as a full-screen background overlay with bg-slate-900/60 on top for the Victory screen.
Wind turbines at sunset. Use as the thumbnail/background for the Wind Energy Phase selection card.
Solar panels at sunset. Use as the thumbnail/background for the Solar Energy Phase selection card.

testing.attributes: All buttons, phase cards, tutorial closes, and the energy bar MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-game-btn', data-testid='energy-progress-bar').

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use generic Shadcn cards for the UI. Build custom Neo-Brutalist divs using the 'surfaces_and_shadows' classes provided.
The 2D HTML5 canvas should be wrapped in a container that looks like a retro TV or a tablet with thick borders.
Implement the UI in pure React components layering over the Canvas (e.g., Main Menu -> Phase Select -> Canvas + HUD).
Use Framer Motion to animate the phase cards popping in stagger-style.
For the ElevenLabs audio integration, create a simple non-blocking audio play utility and trigger it on tutorial popups. Show a 'Speaker' icon toggler in the HUD.
